author: lOrm
content: Fixed: GIT_BIN: LazyLock<Result<PathBuf, String>> in src/plugins/git.rs caches which::which("git") at first use. All three Command::new("git") sites (git_clone L63, resolve_head_sha L93, git_pull L119) now invoke Command::new(git_bin()?). Added 3 regression tests: (1) git_bin_is_absolute_path — invariant that the cached binary is an absolute path; (2) git_clone_uses_resolved_absolute_bin — forensic shim test: prepends a sentinel-touching git to PATH after GIT_BIN resolution and asserts the shim sentinel is never written, proving the dispatch went through the cached absolute path; (3) git_bin_surfaces_missing_binary — failure-surface contract that Err lookup yields PluginError::IoError. Tests 1412 -> 1415, cargo clippy --lib --all-targets -- -D warnings exits 0, cargo fmt clean. No #[allow], no #[ignore], no clippy.toml. which = "8" added to Cargo.toml (already a transitive dep via headless_chrome).
